title: Inventory Item
description: Standard representation of a stocked item used for ordering, transfers, and recipe cost analysis.

uom.description: Primary unit of measure (e.g. L, kg, ea).

case_size.description: Pack size description such as '6 x 1L'.

on_hand.description: Current available quantity expressed in the base unit of measure.

par.description: Preferred minimum inventory level for automated replenishment.

vendor_id.description: External supplier identifier used when building purchase orders.

category.description: Optional category or GL grouping to support reporting.

last_counted_at.description: Timestamp of the last verified physical count.
